response.justification: Sarah demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development experience with a focus on modern web technologies and distributed systems, but lacks the required depth in C++ and large-scale cloud compute infrastructure leadership. Her background in mentoring and technical leadership is a positive, though not directly aligned with the cloud platform focus.
strengths: Diverse technical experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with a focus on testability and user experience.
Proven leadership in mentoring (workshops, talks, and open-source contributions) and establishing engineering best practices.
Hands-on experience with distributed systems, microservices, and infrastructure (e.g., Kubernetes, AWS CDK, real-time data processing).
concerns: Lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience (only ~1 year at National Instruments).
Limited direct experience with cloud compute platforms or large-scale infrastructure leadership (focus is more on full-stack and tooling).
Technical leadership roles have been informal (e.g., workshops, open-source) rather than formal team leadership in cloud/DevOps contexts.
